purpose: Demonstrate reviewed query templates for collecting public famous-case industry-event evidence before manifest publication.
boundary: This query plan is a collection contract. It does not certify result completeness, licensing, identity matching, or production evidence.

review.reviewer: example steward required before production use

collection_policy.rate_limit_note: Production collection must respect source rate limits and cache query receipts.

query_templates.negative_year_rule: A negative year requires a reviewed source-window query showing no qualifying film release, role, award, or nomination for the person-year.
query_templates.sparql: SELECT ?event ?eventLabel ?date ?source WHERE { VALUES ?person { wd:PERSON_QID } { ?event wdt:P161 ?person . } UNION { ?event wdt:P166 ?award . ?event wdt:P1346 ?person . } OPTIONAL { ?event wdt:P577 ?date . } OPTIONAL { ?event prov:wasDerivedFrom ?source . } FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= START_YEAR && YEAR(?date) <= END_YEAR) SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en,zh". } } LIMIT 500

query_templates.negative_year_rule: A negative year requires a reviewed source-window query showing no qualifying release, award, chart/publication, or broadcast marker for the artist-year.
query_templates.sparql: SELECT ?event ?eventLabel ?date ?source WHERE { VALUES ?person { wd:PERSON_QID } { ?event wdt:P175 ?person . } UNION { ?event wdt:P86 ?person . } UNION { ?event wdt:P166 ?award . ?event wdt:P1346 ?person . } OPTIONAL { ?event wdt:P577 ?date . } OPTIONAL { ?event prov:wasDerivedFrom ?source . } FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= START_YEAR && YEAR(?date) <= END_YEAR) SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en,zh". } } LIMIT 500

query_templates.negative_year_rule: A negative year requires a reviewed source-window query showing no qualifying title, medal, ranking, record, or major competition result for the athlete-year.
query_templates.sparql: SELECT ?event ?eventLabel ?date ?source WHERE { VALUES ?person { wd:PERSON_QID } { ?event wdt:P1346 ?person . } UNION { ?event wdt:P710 ?person . } UNION { ?event wdt:P166 ?award . ?person wdt:P166 ?award . } OPTIONAL { ?event wdt:P585 ?date . } OPTIONAL { ?event wdt:P580 ?date . } OPTIONAL { ?event prov:wasDerivedFrom ?source . } FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= START_YEAR && YEAR(?date) <= END_YEAR) SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en,zh". } } LIMIT 500
